subject: Chitonga
coverageNote: Form directories exist only where teaching-module source PDFs were ingested. Missing forms must resolve as known-gap, not empty objects.

lesson.title: Kubupanduluzi buli mumubuzyo 1, balembe kwiimpana nkobatijane muli mbubo.
topics: Sololela basicikolo kunongaula bupanduluzi bwa Litilicca.
Gwasyilizya basicikolo kubona kuti mubandi weenda bweelede.
